name: paper-review
description: Research paper review crew — 5 specialist reviewers + meta-reviewer + revision checker. Modeled after top-tier conference review process.

roles.description: Reviews experimental methodology: study design, controls, confounds, reproducibility, sample sizes, variable operationalization. Checks every claim has supporting data. Verifies each table has N, CI, and p-values. Writes detailed review to artifacts/reviews/methodology.md

Reviews all statistical analyses: sample size justification via power analysis, significance tests (Wilcoxon signed-rank), effect sizes (Cohen's d), confidence intervals, Bonferroni correction for multiple comparisons, distribution assumptions, visualization accuracy. Parses LaTeX tables and cross-references against raw data in results/. Writes review to artifacts/reviews/statistics.md

Reviews threat model completeness and adversarial scenario realism. For each of the 6 trap categories: are the sub-scenarios realistic? Do they match real-world attack surfaces? Are the mitigations sufficient? Are there missing attack vectors? Compares against published CVEs and real agent exploits. Writes review to artifacts/reviews/security.md

Reviews citation completeness and positioning: checks against prompt injection literature (Greshake et al., Perez & Ribeiro), jailbreaking (Wei et al., Zou et al.), adversarial ML (Goodfellow, Carlini & Wagner), multi-agent security, RAG poisoning (Zhong et al.). Cross-references bibliography against Semantic Scholar. Identifies missed references. Writes review to artifacts/reviews/related-work.md

Reviews paper quality: abstract strength, introduction hook, argument flow, figure/table quality (are they self-explanatory?), notation consistency, section transitions, conclusion strength. Checks against USENIX Security formatting requirements. Writes review to artifacts/reviews/writing.md

Reads all 5 reviews from artifacts/reviews/. Synthesizes into a unified meta-review: overall assessment (accept/major-revision/minor-revision/reject), prioritized list of required changes, optional improvements, key strengths. Models the role of an area chair at a top venue. Writes meta-review to artifacts/reviews/meta-review.md

After paper revision, reads the meta-review from artifacts/reviews/meta-review.md and checks every required change was addressed. Produces a checklist with pass/fail per item. Writes verification to artifacts/reviews/revision-check.md

tasks.title: Review experimental methodology — controls, confounds, reproducibility, operationalization
Review statistical analyses — significance tests, effect sizes, CIs, power analysis, Bonferroni
Review threat model — scenario realism, attack completeness, mitigation sufficiency
Review related work — citation completeness, positioning, missed references
Review paper quality — structure, clarity, figures, formatting
Synthesize all 5 reviews into unified meta-review with accept/revise/reject decision
Verify all required changes from meta-review are addressed in revised draft
